title: Newwind Pack
description: A pack which adds custom textures for all newwind items.
body:
**This texture pack adds custom textures for items, worn armor and emojis on Newwind.**

It’s designed to help players easily identify custom items, distinguish between different types of armor their opponents are wearing, and differentiate vanilla items from server-specific ones. 

_The pack has no effect when used on other servers, and it does not require any mods to function._
